channel.title: Human Computer Interaction on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in Human Computer Interaction on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Unified Terminal Experience, BACU
item.description: Motivation In this page I am going to demonstrate an idea of a unified terminal experience. To substantiate it, I created an application for SQL, using ncurses and python, but the concept is to apply the same principle in any hierarchical tree structure, aiding the development by an underlying library. The interaction we have each day with computers varies from application to application. This is also the case for terminal experience.
